'''dhadhuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dockling|dockling]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-dh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dockling|dockling]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhadhuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhædhirith|dhædhirith]] || [[word:dhædhirij|dhædhirij]] || [[word:dhædhirish|dhædhirish]] || [[word:dhædhiri|dhædhiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhadhudhuruth|dhadhudhuruth]] || [[word:dhadhudhuruj|dhadhudhuruj]] || [[word:dhadhudhurush|dhadhudhurush]] || [[word:dhadhudhuru|dhadhudhuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhadhuruth|dhadhuruth]] || [[word:dhadhuruj|dhadhuruj]] || [[word:dhadhurush|dhadhurush]] || [[word:dhadhuru|dhadhuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhadhufruth|dhadhufruth]] || [[word:dhadhufruj|dhadhufruj]] || [[word:dhadhufrush|dhadhufrush]] || [[word:dhadhufruf|dhadhufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhadhuruthu|dhadhuruthu]] || [[word:dhadhuruju|dhadhuruju]] || [[word:dhadhurushu|dhadhurushu]] || [[word:dhadhuruku|dhadhuruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhadhuruth|dhadhuruth]] || [[word:dhadhuruj|dhadhuruj]] || [[word:dhadhurush|dhadhurush]] || [[word:dhadhuru|dhadhuru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhadhuruthul|dhadhuruthul]] || [[word:dhadhurujul|dhadhurujul]] || [[word:dhadhurushul|dhadhurushul]] || [[word:dhadhurukul|dhadhurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhadhuruthuthu|dhadhuruthuthu]] || [[word:dhadhurujuju|dhadhurujuju]] || [[word:dhadhurushushu|dhadhurushushu]] || [[word:dhadhuruku|dhadhuruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhadhuruthun|dhadhuruthun]] || [[word:dhadhurujun|dhadhurujun]] || [[word:dhadhurushun|dhadhurushun]] || [[word:dhadhurukun|dhadhurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhadhuruthuoro|dhadhuruthuoro]] || [[word:dhadhurujuoro|dhadhurujuoro]] || [[word:dhadhurushuoro|dhadhurushuoro]] || [[word:dhadhurukuoro|dhadhurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
